reviews.name: Ahmed Al-Salem
reviews.text: Excellent and fast service in repairing kitchen doors. I highly recommend them.

reviews.name: Fahad Al-Dawsari
reviews.text: My kitchen was dismantled and reinstalled with high professionalism and no scratches.

reviews.name: Noura Al-Otaibi
reviews.text: Very reasonable prices compared to the quality of work and punctuality.

questions.q: Do you provide a warranty on maintenance work?
questions.a: Yes, we provide a warranty on all replaced parts and maintenance services.

questions.q: How long does kitchen dismantling and installation take?
questions.a: It usually takes 1 to 2 days depending on the kitchen size.

questions.q: Do you serve all districts in Riyadh?
questions.a: Yes, we cover all areas and neighborhoods in Riyadh.

questions.q: What is the cost of kitchen maintenance?
questions.a: Cost varies based on the issue and required parts. Pricing is provided after inspection.

questions.q: Can you change the color of aluminum doors?
questions.a: Yes, we offer renovation services including replacing kitchen facades.
We operate 6 days a week, closed only on Fridays.
